messages.author: Godert
messages.text: Hi all, A long time ago when I started with Meshtastic, I ordered the wrong T-Beam on 433MHz. Do you guys know if I can swap the LORAchip with a 868MHz one? Greetings from the Netherlands.
messages.content_html: Hi all, A long time ago when I started with Meshtastic, I ordered the wrong T-Beam on 433MHz. Do you guys know if I can swap the LORAchip with a 868MHz one? Greetings from the Netherlands.

messages.author: Godert
messages.text: Hi Bryan, on this board (you can check it on AliExpress for example) the chip says 433MHz Model: LoRa. That is why I think it is only this chip.
messages.content_html: Hi Bryan, on this board (you can check it on AliExpress for example) the chip says 433MHz Model: LoRa. That is why I think it is only this chip.

messages.author: Godert
messages.text: Update: I succesfully changed the chip out with the other one and it is working good on Meshtastic. Unfortunately this T-Beam does not accept any of the MeshCore Firmware versions.
messages.content_html: Update: I succesfully changed the chip out with the other one and it is working good on Meshtastic. Unfortunately this T-Beam does not accept any of the MeshCore Firmware versions.
